description: Implement a new workload scheduling policy on the cluster according to the specification at /home/ga/Desktop/scheduling_spec.yaml. Apply the required labels and taints to the cluster node, create the specified PriorityClasses, and deploy a 'log-collector' DaemonSet in the 'monitoring' namespace using the nodeSelector, toleration, and priorityClassName constraints exactly as defined. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
